_description:
Reviewer-curated manifest-level overrides. Two mechanisms:
  1. 'flips' — tokens whose CT + masks need AP-flipping. Flipped across the CT's world-Y bounding-box center via full 3D resampling; all affected files for the case mirror about the SAME external plane to preserve mask-on-CT alignment. Optional 'sides' field controls which side flips on separate cases.
  2. 'exclusions' — tokens to drop entirely from the output manifest because the mask/series pairing is wrong (mis-assigned series, placement failure beyond AP orientation, etc.). Flipping won't fix these; they must be removed or re-placed manually before they can rejoin the dataset.
Tokens not listed in either section pass through unchanged.
_reviewer_instructions: 1. Run Stage 2 once without any flips/exclusions (empty lists).
2. Inspect data/qc_figures/ -- identify cases needing flips vs exclusions.
3. Add flip entries for AP-inverted-but-correctly-paired cases.
4. Add exclusion entries for cases where the mask and CT don't belong together.
5. Re-run Stage 2; Step C picks up both lists.
7. Excluded tokens appear in the Stage 2 log but not in the output manifest.
_sides_field: Optional 'sides' list on flip entries controls WHICH files get flipped:
omitted (default)  : all applicable files for the case's match_type
fused       -> CT + spine mask + pelvic mask
['spine']          : flip ONLY the spine CT + spine mask (separate cases)
['pelvic']         : flip ONLY the pelvic CT + pelvic mask (separate cases)
['spine','pelvic'] : flip both sides on a separate case (rare)
For fused / spine_only / pelvic_only, 'sides' is ignored.

exclusions.notes: Spine mask is totally misaligned with bone on the CT. This is not AP inversion — flipping will not fix it. Likely cause: place_fused_masks.py picked a wrong-series candidate as the best spine match for this patient, OR the CTSpine1K annotation references a scan that was never reliably paired. Excluding from dataset pending manual re-investigation (inspect placed_manifest entry for 680; consider pulling alternative candidate series UIDs from patient_db.json and re-running placement with a forced UID override).

flips.notes: Fused; visually inverted. CT + spine + pelvic flip together.
Separate. Spine side inverted; pelvic side is correctly oriented. Flip spine CT + spine mask only.
Fused; visually inverted. CT + spine + pelvic flip together.
Fused supine; pelvic mass anterior of body middle by ~40mm. Visually confirmed inverted across sagittal + coronal + axial views. body-center detector delta_posterior_mm = -40.9.
Separate. Spine side inverted; pelvic side correct. Flip spine CT + spine mask only.
Fused; visually inverted. CT + spine + pelvic flip together.
Separate. Spine side inverted; pelvic side correct. Flip spine CT + spine mask only.
Pelvic-only; inverted. Flip pelvic CT + pelvic mask (only side applicable).
Separate. Pelvic side inverted; spine side correct. Flip pelvic CT + pelvic mask only.
